heading: Congressional findings and policies respecting agricultural and commodity production
label: 262n Congressional findings and policies respecting agricultural and commodity production
notes: Codificationis based on section 701 of title VII of H.R. 3750, One Hundredth Congress, as introduced , and enacted into law by .Section 1401 of Pub. L. 95–118Pub. L. 100–202Dec. 11, 1987
DefinitionsThe definitions in apply to this section.section 262p–5 of this title

children.text: The financing of certain programs and projects by multilateral development banks has been of great concern insofar as the programs and projects have been detrimental to the interests of American farmers and the agribusiness sector.
An increase in rural income in developing countries will generally result in an increase in exports of United States agricultural and food products.
